div.div:
CommitReport funded with rent for processing window + some buffer
If runs out of funds, frozen and needs to be reinitialized with the last known state, something like TON.unfreezer
init only contains parent (offramp address) plus commit root so address is deterministic, the actual contents are set via Commit

div.div:
NOTE: when report is fully consumed we can drain the funds into Offramp
we can determine this by looking at min_msg_nr & max_msg_nr then count the number of non-zero execution states

div.p: NOTE: need to be able to resume execution if for example token pools were incorrectly configured and the root didn't fully execute?
releaseOrMint should calculate remaining balance and re-execute if needed, but only for balances that were marked as bounced
